hero.title: Welcome to Penta P Group
hero.subtitle: A modern portfolio of accommodation, hospitality, residence, and warehouse solutions built to support every stage of your journey.
hero.statText: Accommodation, hospitality, residence, and warehouse support under one trusted group.
group.title: A sectioned showcase for every Penta P service
group.subtitle: Designed as a clean, premium grid so each brand can stand out while still feeling part of one cohesive family.
group.card1.label: Accommodation
group.card1.title: Comfortable stays with practical flexibility

group.card2.label: Hospitality

group.card3.label: Residence
